## Description

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / performance improvement
- [ ] Provider or infrastructure change
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] I have run `ruff check src/` and fixed any lint issues.
- [ ] I have run `pytest -m unit` and all unit tests pass.
- [ ] I have updated the frontend with `npm run lint` if I changed frontend code.
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (`README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, or `docs/`).
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if the change is user-facing.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new hard cloud dependencies.

Closes # (if applicable)
